name: selfdex
description: Invoke Selfdex from a target project session for read-only planning, approval-gated Codex native subagent work, and optional commit-gate closeout.

interface.shortDescription: Call Selfdex from the current project session.
interface.longDescription: Selfdex reads the current project read-only, selects one bounded next task, freezes a contract, asks for approval before target writes, and records outcomes in the Selfdex command-center repository. Calling @selfdex is explicit permission for Selfdex to use official Codex native Subagents/MultiAgentV2 when useful; risky operations still require separate approval. When explicitly requested or policy-enabled, its commit gate can close reviewed and verified work with commit, push, GitHub Actions status, and run evidence before the next candidate is selected.
defaultPrompt: @selfdex read this project and choose the next safe task
@selfdex make a read-only plan for this repo
@selfdex close the verified task with the commit gate
